name: Swing Social Golf Lounge
about: Swing Social Golf Lounge is an indoor golf simulation facility located in Odessa, TX. It utilizes TrackMan technology, offering PGA-level simulation experiences with access to over 300 world-class courses in a climate-controlled environment. The venue combines advanced golf technology with a laid-back lounge atmosphere, providing a space for both serious practice and casual play. It operates on a per-bay hourly basis with availability for groups up to 8 people and offers a full bar and food menu.
why_golfers_like_it: PGA-level TrackMan technology for realistic simulation and accurate data
Access to over 300 world-class courses, allowing for diverse and varied play
Lounge atmosphere with a full bar and food service for a complete social experience
Perfect, consistent conditions regardless of weather

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with fan favorites like club sandwiches, flatbread pizza, loaded queso, and spinach & artichoke dip. Outside food and beverages are not permitted.
Full bar with expert bartenders serving signature cocktails and other beverages.

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced radar technology providing accurate data and a realistic golfing experience.

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No! We offer both right-handed and left-handed rental club sets for $10 per hour.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and beverages are not permitted. We have a full kitchen and bar available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time for playing 18 holes. We recommend booking at least 2 hours, as most groups end up wanting to extend their time.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically advertise as kid-friendly. It is described as a lounge with a full bar, which suggests an adult-oriented atmosphere.
